emails.subject: Conference on Standardized Contract
emails.body: Mark Attached is the preliminary outline of a conference EEI is considering holding on November 17, 1999 to introduce the form of standardized power contract developed through EEI. You will note that EEI listed you as a potential speaker. EEI has also called me to discuss my role in this presentation but I wanted to get your thoughts first. Thanks Elizabeth 36349 Forwarded by Elizabeth Sager/HOU/ECT on 08/16/99 03:24 PM Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: "Andy Katz" <AKatz@eei.org> 08/06/99 05:15 PM

emails.subject: Re: Conference on Standardized Contract
emails.body: Re: Conference on Standardized Contract Elizabeth, I would like to present at this conference, subject to knowing more about it. Let's talk about about what we would want to talk about. I am wondering how interesting the topic will be. Mark
